name: Field Theory — Galois Theory
description: Galois extension: normal and separable. Galois group Gal(K/F) = Aut_F(K). Fundamental Theorem: subfields ↔ subgroups; normal subextensions ↔ normal subgroups.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Normal extension\nsplit field of poly"]
    D2["Def: Separable extension\nmin polys separable"]
    D3["Def: Galois extension\nnormal and separable"]
    D4["Def: Galois group\nGal K/F = Aut_F K"]
    T1["Thm: FTGT\nsubfields ↔ subgroups"]
    T2["Thm: |Gal K/F| = [K:F]"]
    T3["Thm: K^H = fixed field\nof H"]
    D1 --> D3
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> D4
    D4 --> T1
    D4 --> T2
    D4 --> T3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3 theorem
